examples.title: K-Fold Cross Validation
examples.description: Technique to estimate model generalization error
examples.code:
PROCEDURE KFoldCV(data, k):
  splits = partition(data, k)
  FOR i IN 1..k:
    train = all splits except i
    test = split i
    model.fit(train)
    errors[i] = model.evaluate(test)
  RETURN mean(errors)
examples.explanation: Reduces variance in error estimation by multiple data splits
